title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Resolution No. 2020-002 Dated February 3, 2020 of Barangay Malinta, ?resolution Interposing No Objection to the Construction, Installation, Operation and Maintenance of a Telecommunications Cell Site and Its Appurtences of Globe Telecommunication Inc.
